selected_issue.issue: Missing round-state vector fields in contract_diagnostics payload
selected_issue.title: Replay/contract diagnostics lacked alive/hp/loadout and round phase metadata required for full Bible-aligned diagnosis

why_it_outranked_alternatives: Current evidence showed no unresolved rank 1-4 issues: structural, canonical tests, replay mismatch, and high-frequency diagnostic failures were all clear. The highest unresolved bounded issue was rank 5 missing instrumentation because contract_diagnostics omitted round-state vector fields needed for effective diagnosis.

checks.command: python3 probe for resolve contract_diagnostics round-state fields
checks.result: {'alive_count_a': False, 'alive_count_b': False, 'hp_total_a': False, 'hp_total_b': False, 'loadout_total_a': False, 'loadout_total_b': False, 'round_phase': False, 'round_number': False}

checks.command: python3 probe for replay assessment required round-state keys
checks.result: {'alive_count_a': False, 'alive_count_b': False, 'hp_total_a': False, 'hp_total_b': False, 'loadout_total_a': False, 'loadout_total_b': False, 'round_phase': False, 'round_number': False}

files_changed.change: Added round-state vector fields (alive_counts, hp_totals, loadout_totals, round_phase, round_number) to contract diagnostics output.
Wired and type-guarded frame round-state values into compute_phat_contract_diagnostics.
Extended required contract_diagnostics key list to include new round-state fields.
Updated diagnostics unit tests with new arguments and assertions.
Added assertions that resolve-emitted diagnostics include new round-state fields.

validation_performed.result: new required keys alive_counts/hp_totals/loadout_totals/round_phase/round_number present with key_presence_rate=1.0 and missing_key_count=0

before_after_evidence.before: Contract diagnostics completeness contract did not include round-state vector fields, limiting failure diagnosis context.
before_after_evidence.after: Contract diagnostics and replay completeness metrics now include round-state vector fields (alive/hp/loadout/phase/round-number) with full presence on current fixtures.

unresolved_risks: Presence checks do not by themselves guarantee semantic correctness of upstream source values.
round_number may be null when omitted by source payloads; this run improves visibility, not source completeness.
stop_reason: Selected rank-5 instrumentation issue is fixed and validated with minimal bounded changes; further expansion would exceed this single-issue maintenance scope.
